heading: Delete Query Limits
body:
You can delete a project or per federated database instance limit from the Atlas CLI, Atlas UI, and
API (Application Programming Interface).

Atlas CLI

To remove the specified Data Federation query limit from your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas dataFederation queryLimits delete <name> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas dataFederation queryLimits delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-dataFederation-queryLimits-delete).

UI
